sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43113" key="e(tera/riqmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερ-άριθμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n43113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of different number</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἑ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change of number</tr_>, as a figure of speech, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2596.tlg001:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phoeb.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
